title: Favorite crazy Evangelion theories
wikitext:
[]: Favorite crazy Evangelion theories             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:01 pm Post your favorite crazy Eva theories here. Even though they're most likely not true, which one is your favorite? I always liked the "Keel is the Wandering Jew" theory. It just seemed really original and funny. Who knows, maybe he is.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:26 pm The entire show is just a flasback Shinji is having.

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:35 pm child of Lilith wrote: The entire show is just a flasback Shinji is having.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jul 24, 2010 1:53 am I believe it was NAW who discovered that Pen Pen was actually the most tragic character of the show, and was actually in love with Shinji the whole time. Oh, this thread is for theories? I thought it was for hard facts that have yet to be recognized by the fandom.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sat Jul 24, 2010 1:57 am lol I had totally forgotten about that until you brought it up.

[]:             Quote Post by jiynovelo » Sat Jul 24, 2010 2:51 am Everything is just a dream, then Shinji wakes up at, like, on the alternate dimention on episode 26

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jul 24, 2010 4:38 am In the TV Ending, Shinji and everyone else upload to a Singularity utopia.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Sat Jul 24, 2010 10:07 am Kiel is Jesus

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sat Jul 24, 2010 10:49 am There was a guy over at the A.N. Forum who claimed that the endings were contradictory but they still both happened in the same continuity. He believed that all of EoTV happened after EOE. Apparently sometime after Asuka said "Kimochi Warui" Shinji had Rei re-start Instrumentality, resulting in EoTV. I once saw a thread on Usenet where a poster was insisting that the "real reason" Shinji tried to throttle Asuka on the beach was he was angry that she wasn't Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jul 24, 2010 11:12 pm Wow, no Duel of the Seeds mention yet?

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Jul 24, 2010 11:18 pm That the Harpies have Shinji's classmate's souls in them. The idea is so deliciously morbid, it makes me want to do filthy and degrading things with a lolipop.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Jul 24, 2010 11:38 pm Sachi wrote: I believe it was NAW who discovered that Pen Pen was actually the most tragic character of the show, and was actually in love with Shinji the whole time.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jul 25, 2010 12:19 am some good ones here... and one that made me I think I'll go with a wacky NGE = religion theory: 2I was actually the rapture and the entire series is an anime retelling of the book of revelations.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Sun Jul 25, 2010 12:31 am My favorite is the one where Shinji was given powers to warp reality somehow thanks to 3I/GNR/Instrumentality, and that everyone in the Evangelion cast is actually a time-traveling (and genderbent, as the need may apply) Shinji Ikari from post-3I, and that no matter how hard he tries to change things, everything remains exactly the same upon countless attempts to change the future. Amnesia might play into this as well. Second favorite is the "TINES-END" lolphysics GNR head tsunami & related post-apocalyptic events, though on some level I seriously believe it.

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Sun Jul 25, 2010 12:46 am I always liked the Shinji is Gendou, Rei is Ritsuko, and Asuka is Misato Fight Club theory.

[]:             Quote Post by jiynovelo » Sun Jul 25, 2010 3:39 am My new theory: The whole thing is just a Play for a certain festival. If someone asks why it looks real and not like a play... well ask the producers of high school musical. why HSM, well the whole movie is just a play.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 25, 2010 3:42 am I have a certain fondness for this little gem and its take on the Adam-and-Eve ending http://web.archive.org/web/20041206153315/http://www.eltonalteco.net/En/historiaev.php So Shinji and Asuka take bad, just as Adam and Lilith; and however Shinji and Rei were loved, although they never got it to express freely (Well, Rei says in "The end of Evangelion"). Then Shinji must kill and kick Asuka from the "paradise" so tha Rei can enter, who waits for the expulsion of Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Sun Jul 25, 2010 9:11 am Bomby von Bombsville wrote: I always liked the Shinji is Gendou, Rei is Ritsuko, and Asuka is Misato Fight Club theory.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Jul 25, 2010 9:35 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: Wow, no Duel of the Seeds mention yet?

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Jul 25, 2010 12:08 pm ...

[]: Favorite crazy Evangelion theories             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Fri Jul 23, 2010 11:01 pm Post your favorite crazy Eva theories here. Even though they're most likely not true, which one is your favorite? I always liked the "Keel is the Wandering Jew" theory. It just seemed really original and funny. Who knows, maybe he is.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith
